---
title: "References"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Shareable inventory resources keyed by stable resource_id values.

Aliases: `Refs`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `resources` | dict[str, _PublicInventoryItem] | Shareable resource objects stored by resource_id. |
| `resource_id` | str | Stable identifier used by nested inventory items to refer to a resource. |
| `members` | [Interrogator](Interrogator.qmd) \| [Cable](Cable.qmd) \| [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd) \| [ExternalResource](ExternalResource.qmd) | Resource-id objects that can be reused across the inventory tree. |

## Contains

- [Interrogator](Interrogator.qmd)
- [Cable](Cable.qmd)
- [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd)
- [ExternalResource](ExternalResource.qmd)

## Contained By

- [Inventory](Inventory.qmd)

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

_None._
